title: 151 Anti Slip Tape, 4 Metre Roll
features: EXCELLENT GRIP & FRICTION: 151 Anti Slip Tape, apply to stairs, ramps, walkways. Durable, self adhesive, easy to apply, creating an instant non-stick step & floor surface.
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: 151 Anti Slip Tape, apply to wood, stone, metal, concrete or cement in the home, office, workshop or garage.
EASY TO APPLY: 151 Anti Slip Tape, simply measure the area, cut from the 4 metre roll, remove the backing and apply. Always ensure the area is clean, dry, dust & debris free before application.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use, anti-slip tape 25mm x 4 metres . Store at room temperature
